question: Create a function template `printArray(const T arr[], int size)` that can print the elements of any 1D array, regardless of its data type (`int`, `double`, `char`, etc.). Demonstrate its use with an array of integers and an array of doubles.

test_cases.expected: (Compilation Error: Attempt to modify a const object)
(Compilation Error: Attempt to modify a const object)

errors: Attempting to assign a value to `arr[i]` inside the `printArray` function, where `arr` is declared as `const T arr[]`. This violates the const-correctness rule and results in a compilation error.
